my_thoughts: 'The ones I date'—revised from all to subset. Progress. Now teacher asks about selection: why these men? This shifts from 'men are...' to 'I choose men who...' Pattern recognition about own role in selection.
accumulated_insight: T2: Student revises 'Well, the ones I date.' From all to subset. Teacher probes: 'What do you think draws you to judgmental men?' Explores selection pattern. Predicting ask_deeper_question as causality explored.
visible_response:
And when you put them on the women, it is no wonder you get anxious.
You have an internal judge. Then, when you put that judge onto these women, you are afraid and uncomfortable.
You’re not afraid of the women. You’re afraid of that judgmental image you place on those women.
